title: Elon's Anthropic Deal, The Next AI Monopoly?, "FDA for AI" Panic, Trading the AI Boom
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros! Thoughts on the LA mayor election

(4:38) SpaceX-Anthropic deal, Elon Web Services, SpaceX IPO valuation, Anthropic's insane growth trajectory

(26:48) Is Anthropic the next great monopoly? Early signals or major overreaction?

(35:21) "FDA for AI" freakout, how the White House thinks about AI safety

(52:01) Flipping AI's negative perception: Giving, healthcare and education innovation

(1:00:04) Trading the AI market, state of the economy

transcript:
cd ~/Documents/all-in-podcast-tracker
python3 << 'PY'
import json, glob, subprocess
path = glob.glob('data/episodes/2026-05-08-*.json')[0]
transcript = subprocess.check_output(['pbpaste']).decode('utf-8').strip()
ep = json.load(open(path))
ep['transcript'] = transcript
ep.pop('analysis', None)
with open(path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(ep, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
print(f"injected {len(transcript)} chars into {path}")
PY
